title: crinum pratense var. longifolium
intro: Crinum pratense var. longifolium, also known as the 'Long-Leaf Swamp Lily', is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which help to combat infections and soothe digestive issues. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and acting as an expectorant to ease congestion. In terms of herbal preparations, the Long-Leaf Swamp Lily is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
